title: Technology consideration: Quantum computers and post-quantum cryptography (FR)
summary: Technology consideration by the Swiss National Cyber Security Centre on quantum computers and post-quantum cryptography, stressing that migration to PQC is a long process requiring planning in line with current standardisation.

title: Technology consideration: Quantum computers and post-quantum cryptography (DE)
summary: German-language technology consideration by the Swiss National Cyber Security Centre explaining post-quantum cryptography (PQK), what has been achieved and where matters stand.

title: BACS assessment: Post-quantum cryptography and measures to be taken (FR)
summary: Assessment by the Swiss Federal Office for Cybersecurity (BACS) on post-quantum cryptography, following its technology consideration, setting out the situation and the measures to be taken.

title: BACS assessment: Post-quantum cryptography (DE)
summary: German-language assessment by the Swiss Federal Office for Cybersecurity (BACS) on quantum-computer-resistant methods and algorithms developed as post-quantum cryptography (PQK).

title: Annual Report 2025 - National Cyber Security Centre NCSC
summary: Annual report of the Swiss National Cyber Security Centre, listing technology considerations including quantum computers and post-quantum cryptography among its published work.

title: Report on the implementation of the National Cyber Strategy (NCS) 2024
summary: Report on the implementation of Switzerland's National Cyber Strategy, citing quantum computing and post-quantum cryptography among the technology considerations produced.

title: Annual Report 2024 - Federal Office for Cybersecurity BACS (DE)
summary: Annual report of the Swiss Federal Office for Cybersecurity (BACS), referencing its assessment of the need for action in relation to post-quantum cryptography (PQK).

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography (BIT/FOITT)
summary: Document from the Swiss Federal Office of Information Technology, Systems and Telecommunication (BIT) emphasising the need to switch early to post-quantum cryptography, especially for long-term confidential data.

title: Action Plan to a Quantum-Safe Financial Future
summary: Action plan hosted by the Swiss State Secretariat for International Financial Matters (SIF) proposing a coordinated transition to post-quantum cryptography for the financial sector.

title: Confederation's transition to post-quantum cryptography (Curia Vista affair 24.4398)
summary: Swiss parliamentary affair on the use of quantum-safe / post-quantum cryptography by the Confederation, noting the federal focus on post-quantum cryptography over quantum key distribution.

title: Quantum-safe systems in the Confederation (Curia Vista affair 23.3689)
summary: Swiss parliamentary affair on quantum-safe systems in the Confederation, referencing the federal selection process for post-quantum cryptography expected to conclude in 2024.

title: Positioning Switzerland as a leader in quantum computing and post-quantum cryptography (Curia Vista affair 24.4511)
summary: Swiss parliamentary affair seeking proposals on how Switzerland can take a leading role in international bodies on quantum computing and post-quantum cryptography.

title: Report of the Security Policy Committee of the Council of States (22.4270)
summary: Committee report of the Council of States Security Policy Committee listing cryptography including post-quantum cryptography, quantum computers and AI among priority technologies.

title: Swiss National Bank, 118th Annual Report 2025
summary: Annual report of the Swiss National Bank noting the adaptation of existing infrastructure to the requirements of post-quantum cryptography.

title: Swiss National Bank, 116th Annual Report 2023
summary: Annual report of the Swiss National Bank noting that a post-quantum cryptography mode was used to protect central bank digital currency (CBDC) against attacks by quantum computers.
